name: Contact Form
description: Multi-field contact form with name, email, message, and optional subject/category.

slots.form-fields: Stacked input fields for name, email, subject, and message
slots.submit-row: Submit button with optional cancel or reset action

auradecantism.notes: Form in d-glass card. Submit button prominent. Heading uses d-gradient-text.

clean.notes: Standard card form. No extra decoration needed.
